title: Planet Zoo 2 - Announce Trailer
contents_preview: Calling all Zookeepers!Grab your Keeper outfit, brush off your wellies and get ready for the sequel you’ve been waiting for - Planet Zoo 2 is coming!Soar to great heights with flying birds, prepare your diving suits as aquatic species make a splash, and take your conservation efforts beyond your zoo
